runtime_policy: repo-only fixture tests; launches only Python child processes for parser CLI coverage; does not launch Clash95, CDB, wrappers, PowerShell, or visible windows
guard_policy: proves visible-input evidence cannot be promoted from command readiness to pass until a real visible click is consumed by the battle command callback
tests: visible input summary keeps command-ready runs partial until a real click reaches the callback
visible input summary requires both visible input JSON and callback/click-gate evidence for click consumption
visible input summary rejects invalid CDB breakpoint and post-g break-instruction failures
visible input summary CLI writes JSON/Markdown current artifacts
visible input summary aggregate pass requires at least one consumed-click run
